seoTitle: Kolendo vs Kongorong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kolendo and Kongorong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kolendo and Kongorong.
heading: Kolendo vs Kongorong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kolendo, South Australia and Kongorong, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kolendo has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Kongorong (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kolendo or Kongorong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kolendo has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Kongorong scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kolendo scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Kongorong scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kolendo or Kongorong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kolendo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
